subcodes.first_line: We have dispatched a Book from before the Throne bearing thy name, and We have read it, and have responded unto thee through this Most Manifest Book. Verily thy Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد بعثنا کتابا لدی العرش باسمک و قرئناه و اجبناک بهذا الکتاب المبین ان ربک
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @thankfulness; gratitude, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
